name: chr22_22q11_23_SDC4_GSTT_SD
description: 22q11.23 region containing GSTT1/GSTT2/DDT/MIF SDs and the SDC4 paralog cluster. GSTT1 deletion is one of the most common SD-mediated copy-number polymorphisms in humans (~20% null homozygotes in European populations); driven by ~18 kb direct-orientation SDs flanking GSTT1.

architecture.internal_structure: ~18 kb direct-orientation SDs flanking GSTT1; recurrent NAHR causes GSTT1 null allele. Nearby GSTT2/GSTT2B duplicons and DDT/MIF tandem paralogs at >98% identity.
